title: Java Enum Generator
scenario: Generate a Java enum that represents the days of the week. The enum should have properties for `MONDAY`, `TUESDAY`, `WEDNESDAY`, `THURSDAY`, `FRIDAY`, `SATURDAY`, and `SUNDAY`. The enum should override the `toString` method to return the string representation of the day of the week. The enum should be used in a context where it is passed as an argument to another function.
constraints: Must override the toString method to return the string representation of the day of the week
Must be used in a context where it is passed as an argument to another function

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the enum adheres to the toString method override and usage constraints.
Verify that the enum has correct Java syntax.
Check if the enum is used correctly in the context where it is passed as an argument.
